description: Live testing of authorized internet-facing Tenda devices from WAN position

test_results.SetFirewallCfg: DESTRUCTIVE — iptables doSystemCmd calls flushed WAN access rules, port 80 became filtered, device locked out
test_results.telnet_trigger: NOT TESTED (lockout occurred before telnet test)

targets.outcome: LOCKED OUT — requires partner power cycle
targets.lesson: SetFirewallCfg handler's 11 iptables doSystemCmd calls modify firewall rules; avoid for live WAN testing

targets.outcome: UNREACHABLE — all ports filtered from test position

test_results.telnet_trigger: POST /goform/telnet sent (no auth), HTTP timeout after 10s (consistent with emulation behavior), port 23 remained filtered from WAN
test_results.post_test_httpd: httpd became unresponsive (HTTP 000) after telnet trigger

targets.outcome: HTTPD UNRESPONSIVE after telnet trigger; port 23 not reachable from WAN (telnetd binds LAN IP)
FALSE POSITIVE — not a Tenda device

targets.evidence: Server: TwistedWeb/19.7.0, 134KB HTML page with GL.iNet/GitLab/GoAnywhere/VOS3000 fingerprints
targets.outcome: FALSE POSITIVE — honeypot responding 200 to all paths

key_findings.telnet_lan_binding: telnetd binds to LAN IP via doSystemCmd('telnetd -b %s &', GetValue('lan.ip')) — not reachable from WAN. [REDACTED-ID]_002 CVSS corrected from 9.8 (AV:N) to 8.8 (AV:A)
key_findings.setfirewallcfg_destructive: SetFirewallCfg executes 11 iptables doSystemCmd calls that can flush WAN management access rules — avoid for live WAN testing
key_findings.ac10u_missing_endpoints: AC10U models lack WriteFacMac and SetSambaConf — novel findings [REDACTED-ID]_025/026 are AC15-specific
key_findings.goform_confirmed_live: Tenda goform framework confirmed active on internet-facing devices; empty password auth works on factory-default devices
